message:
refactor(interactive): migrate enqueue_pi_event to enqueue_pi_event_current helper

Follow-up simplification replacing enqueue_pi_event(&event_tx,
&Cx::for_request(), msg) with the shorter enqueue_pi_event_current(&event_tx, msg)
wrapper that internally obtains the Cx. Also reformats long single-line
event calls into multi-line style for readability, and converts one
remaining try_send in the session-save error path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
